steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage explains that “the link of shared humanity with the artist across so many generations” gives the frieze “resonance”—emotional power. The blank must name this emotional quality produced by age.

steps.title: Match the emotional quality
steps.content: “Affecting” means emotionally moving, which directly expresses this resonance. The frieze is affecting precisely because its great age creates a profound human connection across time. The other three name unrelated properties: pristine (physical condition), meticulous (careful execution), and ingenious (clever design). That matches choice C — C is correct.
